tasks.title: Z' contribution to muon g-2 at one loop
tasks.description: Reference one-loop task using canonical parameter names from the model spec.
lagrangian_terms: L_int = - g' Z'_mu (bar{mu} gamma^mu mu - bar{tau} gamma^mu tau)
tasks.kinematics: p1^2 = p2^2 = m_mu^2 and q^2 -> 0 for the external photon probe.
tasks.notes: This is the primary observable motivating the model.

tasks.title: Muon self-energy with a massless photon in the loop
tasks.process: mu -> mu self-energy in a QED-like limit
tasks.description: Demonstrates that a loop propagator mass can be written as numeric 0 for a massless field.
lagrangian_terms: L_int = - e A_mu bar{mu} gamma^mu mu
tasks.kinematics: Keep general p^2 and use a massless internal photon.
tasks.notes: Secondary example covering the massless propagator convention.
